description: Typical distribution: executed.percent between 60–80%, notExecuted.percent between 15–30%, notFound.percent between 3–10%. All three counts are non-zero and sum to totalPIs.

notFound.count = 0, notFound.percent = 0.0. The narrator must report zero explicitly. executed and notExecuted share the full totalPIs.

notFound.percent is high (15–25%). notFound.count is a significant portion of totalPIs. executed.percent is relatively low as a result.

All PIs are executed: executed.count = totalPIs, executed.percent = 100.0. notExecuted.count = 0, notFound.count = 0. Both zero values must be reported explicitly.
Very small totalPIs (10–20 PIs). All three counts present and summing to totalPIs. Tests integer formatting with small numbers and exact 1-decimal percentages.
